---
title: "Exploration of unconditional exact tests for two independent binomials"
subtitle: "Comparing results of sample size computation from East, nQuery and bbssr"
bibliography: references.bibtex
author:
  - name: Arocena Thomas
    orcid: 0009-0002-7014-220X
    email: arocena.thomas@gmail.com
    role: "Stagiaire"
    affiliations: Oncostat
  - name: Dan Chaltiel
    email: dan.chaltiel@gustaveroussy.fr
    orcid: 0000-0003-3488-779X
    role: "Encadrant"
  - name: Anne Lourdessamy
    email: anne.lourdessamy@gustaveroussy.fr
    orcid: 0009-0006-9051-3302
    role: "Encadrante"
date: last-modified
format: html
---

We will compare :

- Pearson Chi-squared Test
- Fisher Exact Test
- Fisher Mid-p Test
- Z-pooled Exact Unconditional Test
- Boschloo Exact Unconditional Test

From `bbssr` package; [Statistical methods explained by Gosuke Homma](https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/gosukehommaEX/bbssr/blob/main/doc/bbssr-statistical-methods.html)

# Comparison of sample sizes
